title: WHERE WAS Misato AT THE TIME OF
display_title: WHERE WAS Misato AT THE TIME OF
wikitext:
[]: WHERE WAS Misato AT THE TIME OF....???             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Oct 28, 2007 10:30 pm ok! so after college, Misato went to go work at Nerv (or Geherin) to get revenge on the Angels. BUT! in ep 1 she said that she was still getting used to the way Nerv was set up and that she still gets lost in there. and in ep 2 she said that she had just moved into her apartment. obviously she hadnt been there for long in ep 6 (i think) when Asuka saw Misato they talked for a little bit and Asuka says somthing that not only she has grown but her figure has filled out too, obviously showing that Misato hasnt seen her for a while, at least a few years. which means she's been out of Germany for a while. and if it is true what was posted in this other thread, that Misato stayed with Kaji and Asuka in Germany (how often was Asuka around Kaji when she was in Germany (maybe i should post another thread about that)) so....where was Misato between the times of Germany and Tokyo-3? and where was she right after college (unless that was when she stayed with Kaji and Asuka)?

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Mon Oct 29, 2007 9:56 am Alright, I'm still an amateur at this kind of thing and I'm still getting used to trying to answer difficult questions and reason and debate, but I'll take a swing at this. My knowledge of the Japanese school system isn't the best either, so anyone, feel free to correct anything I'm wrong about. Ritsuko was born one year before Misato, they met in college in 2005. At this time Ritsuko would've been around 20, Misato around 19. For the sake of argument, let's say they both went into college right after school. Due to their birthdays, both of them would have been 18 respectively when graduating from high school. They would have met in December at the latest during Misato's first year and Ritsuko's second year in college, since Ritsuko graduated in 2008. In 2010 Misato and Kaji joined GEHIRN/NERV. They were both stationed in Germany before they broke up, which was also in 2010. So that places Misato in Germany from an unspecified time period between 2010 and 2015. In 2005 Asuka was selected as a pilot and her father remarried. During 2010, when Misato and Kaji were in Germany, Asuka would've been 9-10 years old. If Misato has any good sense, she would move to another apartment after a break-up with someone (I assume they were living together). Between 2010 to 2015 I imagine Misato was doing a lot of travelling and devoting her life to her work. She went from being a "new hire" in 2010 to a Captain of Tactical Operations by 2014-2015. If I had to guess, I would say she was in Germany, Japan, and anyplace else that would benefit furthering her career. After she had, more or less, reached the top of her level and had no superiors in her field, she was probably pulled into Tokyo-3 to serve in the main center of operations and pick up Shinji. Convenient that the top Tactical Ops agent in the field and the new pilot would be scheduled to arrive around the time of an Angel attack, isn't it? Almost like it was arriving right on time ... Like a delivery ? This is a spur of the moment thing, so sorry if it's sloppy and not very cohesive. I gathered all my information from the Official Evapedia Timeline™ !

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Oct 29, 2007 11:37 am I already figured this out: 1-Misato graduates college, and joins Gehirn in 2010, soon before it is reorganized into Nerv. 2 - When Misato joined Gehirn, she began working in Germany 3 - Misato only moved into Tokyo-3 a matter of days before the show began in 2015 Misato was working, as far as can be discerned, at Nerv-3 in Germany between 2010 and 2015, before moving to Tokyo-3. She MAY have gone to other bases in the meantime, but we don't know of this. She was Asuka's handler in Germany before Kaji. That's pretty straightfoward,a ctually.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 29, 2007 12:02 pm V wrote: 3 - Misato only moved into Tokyo-3 a matter of days before the show began in 2015

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:01 pm Mr. Tines wrote: V wrote: 3 - Misato only moved into Tokyo-3 a matter of days before the show began in 2015

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Oct 29, 2007 7:11 pm fadingreminder wrote: Convenient that the top Tactical Ops agent in the field and the new pilot would be scheduled to arrive around the time of an Angel attack, isn't it? Almost like it was arriving right on time ... Like a delivery ? [/url]!

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Oct 29, 2007 8:28 pm I do believe that on-air dialogue has Misato say she moved in "the other day"

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Oct 29, 2007 8:35 pm Misato could have been placed in that position for a very good reason, above other candidates- no, not because of her college education, but because of her dad's work...and because she's the sole survivor from Ground Zero in Antarctica.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Oct 29, 2007 8:41 pm and since shes already hellbent on killing the Angels

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Tue Oct 30, 2007 7:18 am Sachiel_13 wrote: SEELE used the Dead Sea Scrolls to predict when the Angels would attack Gendo (being part of the commitee) would have pulled all his strings to help defned against the Angel Attack

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 31, 2007 12:26 am Since when can Angels communicate with eachother its like trying to talk to a tree or something theyre completely different species Kawaro was just a tweak where they put Adam in a human body, and taught him english (er...um Japanese! )

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Wed Oct 31, 2007 7:41 am Sachiel_13 wrote: Since when can Angels communicate with eachother

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 31, 2007 9:06 am maybe that was their way of communicating....MIND RAPE!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Oct 31, 2007 12:05 pm I think there was something somewhere about one of the staff (Tsurimaki maybe?) saying Liliel was attempting to communicate with Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 31, 2007 3:44 pm it said that in the show too didnt it? or it was a theory by Ritsuko
